what: graphSearch() serving-path latency, per query. NOT the eval loop (which also runs a semantic baseline).

protocol.alternation: arm order flips per (rep, query) so cache warmth cannot favor one arm
protocol.note: query embedding measured SEPARATELY and NOT included in the arm timings (it is arm-independent)

userVisible_ms.note: embed + graphSearch. The embedding term is identical across arms and dilutes the ratio.
